title: IT Incident Report
text:
## IT Incident Report

**Incident summary:** Company-wide {adjective} outage began at {number} AM after someone {past-tense verb} the {adjective} server.

**Root cause:** A {adjective} patch pushed by {person} during lunch.

**User impact:** {number} employees unable to {verb} for {number} minutes.

**Timeline:** Tier-1 missed the alert because the queue was {adjective}; fix attempted by {verb ending in -ing} the {object} twice.

**Action items:**
- Add {adjective} monitoring
- Ban {plural noun} on Fridays
- Require {adjective} approval before rebooting anything.

**Blameless note:** The vendor swore the update was harmless.

**Status:** Ticket closed.
